artPrompt: A goblin herald mid-bellow on a barrel, one hand cupped to his mouth, the other shaking a crumpled blank scroll, flame-orange wash and sparks bursting from his cry up the wide frame against night-black smoke. The feral square riots behind, confetti drifting. All animated proclamation and breathless gesture. Gleeful anarchic mayhem, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Town Crier Goblin
text: When Town Crier Goblin enters the battlefield, discard a card, then draw a card.
flavorText: "Hear ye, hear ye! The mayor has done a thing! We're looking into what!"
